title: Challenge Mode — Procedural Puzzles, Sandbox, Difficulty Slider, Leaderboard
summary: Add infinite replayability with a Challenge Mode: procedurally generated truth tables, a Sandbox free-build mode, difficulty slider (2-4 inputs, 1-2 outputs), gate-count scoring, and a localStorage leaderboard. The level select screen gains a Challenge Mode entry point.

tasks.description: Challenge Mode entry — add a 'Challenge Mode' section to the level select screen below the chapters. Two buttons: 'Random Challenge' and 'Sandbox'. Visual styling matches the existing level select aesthetic (green neon, dark background, Courier New).
acceptance_criteria: Challenge Mode section visible on level select screen below chapters
'Random Challenge' button is clickable and styled consistently
'Sandbox' button is clickable and styled consistently
Buttons have hover effects matching existing level buttons

tasks.description: Procedural truth table generator — generate random truth tables with configurable parameters: number of inputs (2-4), number of outputs (1-2). The generated table must be non-trivial (not all-0 or all-1 for any output), and solvable with basic gates. Exclude degenerate cases (output identical to a single input).
acceptance_criteria: Generator produces valid truth tables for 2, 3, and 4 inputs
Generator produces valid truth tables for 1 and 2 outputs
No degenerate tables (all-0, all-1, or single-input passthrough)
Function signature: generateChallenge(numInputs, numOutputs) returns a level-compatible object
Generated level includes correct input/output node positions scaled to the number of I/O

tasks.description: Difficulty slider UI — when 'Random Challenge' is clicked, show a difficulty configuration panel with: input count slider (2-4), output count slider (1-2), and a 'Generate' button. Display difficulty label (Easy/Medium/Hard/Expert based on input×output combinations).
acceptance_criteria: Difficulty panel appears when 'Random Challenge' is clicked
Input count slider works (2-4) with live label update
Output count slider works (1-2) with live label update
Difficulty label updates dynamically (Easy: 2in/1out, Medium: 2in/2out or 3in/1out, Hard: 3in/2out or 4in/1out, Expert: 4in/2out)
'Generate' button starts the challenge with selected parameters
Back button returns to level select

tasks.description: Sandbox mode — free-build canvas with all gates available (AND, OR, NOT, XOR), no truth table target, no run/pass/fail. The info panel shows 'Sandbox Mode' header, gate count, and a truth table that shows the ACTUAL behavior of whatever circuit is built (auto-updates). Include a 'Test' button that evaluates and shows the current circuit's truth table.
acceptance_criteria: Sandbox mode loads with all 4 gate types available
2 inputs (A, B) and 1 output (OUT) by default
No target truth table — info panel shows 'Sandbox Mode'
'Test Circuit' button evaluates and displays the actual truth table
Gate count displayed live
No star rating or celebration
Back button returns to level select

tasks.description: Scoring and localStorage leaderboard — after completing a challenge, show gate count as score. Store top 10 scores per difficulty level in localStorage. Show leaderboard on the challenge config panel. Score format: difficulty + gate count + timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: Challenge completion shows gate count score
Top 10 scores saved per difficulty in localStorage
Leaderboard displayed on challenge config panel
Leaderboard shows rank, gate count, difficulty, and date
Clear leaderboard option available
Scores persist across page reloads

testing_focus: Procedural truth table generation — verify non-trivial tables at all difficulty levels
Sandbox mode — verify free-build with no scoring interference
Difficulty slider — verify all combinations produce valid challenges
Regression: all 10 campaign levels still work correctly
Screen navigation: level select ↔ challenge config ↔ gameplay ↔ sandbox
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced in campaign mode or core gameplay, revert to previous commit
